chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. Cr. Bail Appl No.2488 of 2024 (Malik Muhammad Afzal vs. The State) 27.11.2024 Mr. Muhammad Rehman Ghous, advocate a/w applicants Mr. Imran Abbas, advocate for complainant Ms. Rahat Ahsan, Addl: PG Sindh O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: During arguments, it has transpired that bail application of the applicants was dismissed in non-prosecution and not on merits by Sessions Court. Learned defence counsel, when confronted with this fact requests that this ad-interim bail application be converted into protective bail and applicants may be granted protective bail for some time, so that they could repeat bail application before the trial Court. 2. This request has not been opposed by learned Addl: PG Sindh and learned counsel for the complainant. 3. In view of above, without touching merits of the case, this ad-interim pre- arrest bail application is converted into protective bail and applicants are granted protective bail for a period of 07 days from today against the same surety already furnished by them vide order dated 26.10.2024 enabling them to surrender before the trial court. 4. This order shall cease to exist on expiry of 07 days from today viz. 03.12.2024 or on surrender of the applicants before the concerned court, whichever is earlier. The Bail Application stands disposed of. J U D G E Rafiq/P.A.
